name: Garlic Chicken Breasts
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix margarine, chives, and garlic powder in a bowl.
2. Shape the mixture into a rectangle measuring 3 inches by 2 inches.
3. Cover and freeze until firm, about 30 minutes.
4. Remove skin and bones from the chicken breasts.
5. Flatten each chicken breast to a thickness of 1/4 inch between waxed paper or plastic wrap.
6. Cut the margarine mixture into 6 pieces.
7. Place one piece on the center of each chicken breast.
8. Fold the long sides over the margarine, then fold the ends up and secure with a wooden pick.
9. Mix crushed cornflakes cereal, snipped parsley, and paprika in a bowl.
10. Dip each chicken breast into buttermilk, then coat evenly with the cereal mixture.
11. Place the chicken breasts, seam sides down, in a greased square pan measuring 9 inches by 9 inches by 2 inches.
12. Bake uncovered at 425°F until the chicken is cooked through, about 35 minutes.
